item.title: Interval positive fecal immunochemical test is associated with post-colonoscopy colorectal cancer in a screening program.
item.description: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association - Optimal management of individuals who have an unplanned, positive fecal immunochemical test (FIT) after colonoscopy before they are due for either surveillance colonoscopy or FIT re-screening is un...
